description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with four evenly spaced open shelves and a solid back panel. The front face is open, allowing easy access to the shelves, which are recessed slightly from the frame. The sides and back are flat and unadorned, giving the piece a simple, utilitarian appearance. The wood has a medium brown finish with a subtle grain pattern visible across all surfaces. There are no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. This type of shelving unit is commonly used for storage or display in urban environments such as offices, libraries, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A tall, open wooden shelving unit with four shelves and a plain, solid back. The design is simple and functional, with a medium brown wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the recessed shelf design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, solid wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unbroken wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a flat, featureless wood panel.
